global_rules.binding_boundary: Public binding resolution returns A1_REGISTRY_BINDING_RESOLVED and never A2. The private pure binding-set helper is typed, module-owned, unexported, and tested without mutating the frozen production table.
global_rules.canonical_json_persistence: Every persisted JSON object is UTF-8 canonical JSON with recursively lexicographic Unicode code-point key order, compact separators, ensure_ascii=false, no BOM, no leading/trailing whitespace, and no final LF. Schema field order governs closed membership and explicitly declared typed projections only; it never governs stored object-key order.
global_rules.digest_boundary: All public digest helpers are total A0 constructors with fixed field-name/order/tag precedence. Equal-tag field swaps are ERR_CANONICAL_FIELD_ORDER_INVALID.
global_rules.dispatch_ownership: dispatch_i0a_unit_validation is owned by prepared_evidence.py; finding4_registry imports only canonical.py and never imports prepared_evidence.py.
global_rules.error_precedence_rule: Every function materializes ordered_error_precedence. Multi-fault input returns the first satisfied code; repeated element faults choose the lowest canonical ordinal.
global_rules.error_stop_assurance_invariant: Every non-success I0AResultCode returns established_assurances=(). No partial assurance survives a non-success return.
global_rules.established_assurance_policy: Every result object carries established_assurances:tuple[AssuranceLevel,...]. Every function publishes a complete result-code-to-tuple map. All non-success results use the empty tuple; no unstated partial assurance survives failure.
global_rules.import_acyclicity: canonical.py <- finding4_registry.py <- prepared_evidence.py; claim_hashes.py imports canonical.py only; __init__.py re-exports. No reverse import or runtime registration.

import_graph.rule: No reverse import, runtime registration, or duplicated grammar/binding table.

global_rules.one_success_code_one_assurance_tuple_inv: For every I0AResultCode in success_result_codes, success_result_assurance_map contains exactly one tuple. Every public function must return that exact tuple for that code. No function-local override, prefix, subset, superset, or alternate tuple is permitted.
global_rules.path_authority: Callers cannot construct path grammars. FrozenPathGrammarId, all frozen target/prepared-unit tables, placeholder domains, and validate_normalized_relative_path are solely owned by finding4_registry.py.
global_rules.physical_boundary: Only reconcile_physical_payload establishes generic A3 and it uniformly verifies expected exact length plus expected complete-file SHA-256. Governing package/index surfaces use separate A3 pinned-hash assurance.

private_outcome_boundary._resolve_compatible_binding_set: returns _PrivateBindingMatchResult only; no I0AResultCode or assurances
private_outcome_boundary._validate_descriptor_set_invariants: returns _PrivateDescriptorSetInvariantResult only; its closed interface can decide only role cardinality, ordinal sequence, canonical-target uniqueness, sidecar relation, or valid; it returns no I0AResultCode or assurances

_PrivateBindingMatchResult.PRIVATE_BINDING_MATCH_EXACTLY_ONE: matching_bindings is the exact one-element tuple containing the sole matching candidate
_PrivateBindingMatchResult.PRIVATE_BINDING_MATCH_MULTIPLE: matching_bindings is the exact candidate-order tuple of every matching injected candidate

_PrivateDescriptorSetInvariantResult.PRIVATE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_INVARIANTS_VALID: summaries is the exact non-null ordinal-order tuple consumed by the public wrapper
_PrivateDescriptorSetInvariantResult.every_private_error: for each of the exact four private failure codes, summaries=null; no partial summaries survive

global_rules.registry_membership_boundary: Accepted-registry json:/table: schema IDs and internal i0a: structural relation IDs are disjoint typed domains. Accepted-registry membership is never claimed for an internal relation.
global_rules.result_model: Every public function returns exactly one closed typed result. No generic exception, boolean valid/success, permissive fallback, or untyped partial result.

BindingResolutionResult.success: binding is non-null exact frozen-production SchemaBinding; code/assurances equal the global mapping

CanonicalBytesResult.success: value is non-null exact immutable bytes and code/assurances equal the global mapping

DigestResult.success: digest_sha256 is non-null exact 64-character lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 and code/assurances equal the global mapping

PhysicalPayloadResult.ERR_PHYSICAL_EXPECTATION_INVALID: observed_size_bytes=null; observed_sha256=null because expectations fail before observation
PhysicalPayloadResult.ERR_PHYSICAL_SHA256_MISMATCH: observed_size_bytes and observed_sha256 are both non-null actual observations
PhysicalPayloadResult.ERR_PHYSICAL_SIZE_MISMATCH: observed_size_bytes and observed_sha256 are both non-null actual observations
PhysicalPayloadResult.success: observed_size_bytes and observed_sha256 are both non-null actual observations

RegistryDefinitionIndexResult.success: index is non-null and every index field is fully populated; code/assurances equal the global mapping

ValidationResult.non_success: code is the exact first error/stop and established_assurances=()
ValidationResult.success: code is a declared success and established_assurances equals the unique global tuple; no value fields exist

schema_identity_closure.exact_identity_agreement_rule: role matrix selected schema union equals private frozen production binding schema union; both use exact string equality against accepted registry index
schema_identity_closure.selected_content_schema_subset_rule: union of role-matrix selected_content_schema_domain must be subset of exact accepted registry index

global_rules.scope_expansion_rule: Any need for another repository path, existing module edit, third-party dependency, CLI/config/generated code, filesystem adapter, caller-defined grammar, runtime binding mutation, or import cycle is a workflow scope-expansion halt.
global_rules.sidecar_boundary: Descriptor-selected sidecar A6 requires A2 set, A1 binding, selected exact A3, and paired-target exact A3. Fixed structural sidecars use the narrower A3_STRUCTURAL_SIDECAR_PAIR_RECONCILED assurance and never imply A4, A6, descriptor assurance, or filesystem facts.
global_rules.single_vs_set: A2 single and A2 set are distinct. Snapshot PARTITION_PAYLOAD set cardinality derives only from exact validated claim-semantic bytes, never a count parameter.

modules.module_responsibility: closed assurance/result types and total canonical typed-byte constructors; no path grammar ownership

result_payload_contract.non_success: code is the exact first error/stop and established_assurances=()
result_payload_contract.success: code is a declared success and established_assurances equals the unique global tuple; no value fields exist
value is non-null exact immutable bytes and code/assurances equal the global mapping
digest_sha256 is non-null exact 64-character lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 and code/assurances equal the global mapping
